instruction: Replace hard direction-gated meta-domain mapping with soft continuous participation so W1/W2/W3 can overlap simultaneously.

problem.name: winner_take_all_meta_collapse
symptom: global shell spikes to 1.0 for one domain at a time
channel ratios behave like categorical switching instead of overlap
problem.cause: direction gating suppresses domains with negative motion and destroys simultaneous participation

core_correction.remove: direction gating from meta-domain magnitude computation
core_correction.preserve: direction only as metadata for later axis projection
core_correction.new_rule: all active windows must be allowed to contribute softly to the shared meta-domain

code_changes.name: compute_meta_vector
code_changes.code:
def compute_meta_vector(mag, eps=1e-12):
    """
    Convert normalized motion magnitudes into soft continuous participation.
    No direction gating here. Direction is metadata, not a participation killer.
    """
    mag = np.abs(np.array(mag, dtype=np.float64))

    total = float(np.sum(mag) + eps)
    meta = mag / total

    # soften winner-take-all collapse while preserving ordering
    meta = np.sqrt(meta)
    meta = meta / (np.sum(meta) + eps)

    return meta

code_changes.note: Do not use direction as a multiplier in meta-domain participation.

details: Do not use direction to zero out W1/W2/W3 participation.

code_changes.note: After soft participation, ch7 presence should usually be 1 when all windows are active.
This now measures balance of white/full-domain coupling instead of vanishing due to direction gating.

meta_domain_participation: all three windows should show nonzero participation most frames
global_shell: should become continuous rather than binary
W1/W2/W3 should overlap instead of taking exclusive turns
ch7_presence: should rise to 1.0 after initialization if all windows participate
ch7_white_coupling_intensity: should oscillate according to balance among W1/W2/W3
channel_ratios: should look layered/overlapping rather than categorical

interpretation_rules.low_ch7_intensity: one domain weak relative to the others
interpretation_rules.ch7_presence_1: all three windows are structurally present in the whole
interpretation_rules.meta_overlap: the system is describing relational participation rather than choosing a single winning domain

success_conditions: ch7 presence is no longer stuck at 0
ch7 intensity is nonzero and structured
direction still exists but only as metadata
channels remain ratios to the whole

next_patch_after_success.name: axis_projection_8way_v1
next_patch_after_success.purpose: Reintroduce direction as axis projection after soft meta-domain overlap is stable.
